category_sources: Official libjxl README at https://github.com/libjxl/libjxl describes the JPEG XL reference implementation with encoder and decoder.
source_facts.description says 'New file format for still image compression'.
display_name_sources: Official libjxl README heading says 'JPEG XL reference implementation'.
source_facts.homepage is the official JPEG page https://jpeg.org/jpegxl/index.html.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage of cjxl and djxl.
Official JPEG XL documentation page is provided by jpeg.org.
Official libjxl API documentation is linked from the official repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/libjxl/libjxl, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official libjxl README topics and usage describe JPEG XL encoding, decoding, image compression, and CLI tools.
source_facts.executables includes cjxl, djxl, and jxlinfo.
